generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing-angle encoder measuring hoist swing motion on the physical gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring ambient wind speed for the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoBoard : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino‑based board reading sensors and providing status feedback to the crane controller."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ArduinoStatusDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction – DataTransmitted
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance ArduinoStatusDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoBoard
]

// C5: Data entities
instance SwingAngleMeasurement : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped swing‑angle measurement streamed from the encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerMosquitto, TimescaleDBInstance
]

instance WindSpeedMeasurement : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped wind‑speed measurement streamed from the anemometer."
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerMosquitto, TimescaleDBInstance
]

instance CraneStatusData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated status data (motor states, sensor flags) produced by the Arduino board."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ArduinoStatusDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerMosquitto, TimescaleDBInstance
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance Fusion360CraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the crane created in Autodesk Fusion360."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorEngine, SimulationEngine
]

instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used for trajectory planning of the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorEngine
]

instance CranePhysicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics‑based simulation model of the crane and its motor controllers."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBrokerMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker used for messaging between containerized components."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousDataLoggingService,
                     RealTimeVisualizationService,
                     OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService,
                     PhysicsBasedSimulationService,
                     ContinuousValidationService,
                     WebBasedHumanMachineInterfaceService
]

instance TimescaleDBInstance : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time‑series database storing telemetry and logging data."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousDataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaVisualizationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard visualizing performance trends and alerts."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker container generating optimal motion trajectories for the crane."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance SimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker container running physics‑based simulation of crane dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicsBasedSimulationService,
                     ContinuousValidationService
]

instance HumanMachineInterfaceEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based HMI (MkDocs) allowing operators to monitor and configure the twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables WebBasedHumanMachineInterfaceService
]

// C6: Services
instance ContinuousDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous data logging service persisting telemetry to TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization service presenting data on Grafana dashboards."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceTrendInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating optimal motion trajectories for the crane."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight, GenerateOptimalTrajectoryAction
]

instance PhysicsBasedSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing physics‑based simulation of crane and controller behavior."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationOutputInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service continuously validating executed trajectories against simulation results."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertInsight, HaltOperationAction
]

instance WebBasedHumanMachineInterfaceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Web‑based HMI enabling operators to adjust parameters and view insights."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorControlInsight, AdjustOperatorParametersAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance DataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming successful logging of telemetry data."
]

instance PerformanceTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight visualizing performance trends on the Grafana dashboard."
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight presenting the computed optimal motion trajectory for the crane."
]

instance SimulationOutputInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight delivering simulation results for comparison with real‑world data."
]

instance ValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight alerting when validation metrics exceed defined safety thresholds."
]

instance OperatorControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight enabling operators to monitor and control crane parameters via the HMI."
]

// C17: Actions
instance GenerateOptimalTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically generate an optimal trajectory based on the kinematic model."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HaltOperationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Halt crane operation when validation alerts indicate unsafe conditions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustOperatorParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator manually adjusts control parameters through the HMI."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Trajectory Generator Service computes optimal motion trajectories (using the crane kinematics model) and publishes them via the MQTT broker; the Control Application receives these trajectories and, through the Physical Crane Interface, sends command set‑points to the motor controllers to move the cart and hoist. The Human‑Machine Interface can also issue manual commands through the same path."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The overall constellation links the physical crane to a Python‑based interface, which feeds sensor data to a logging service and publishes via MQTT; services (trajectory generation, simulation, validation) subscribe to MQTT, use the stored data in TimescaleDB, and publish results back to the broker; the dashboard and HMI consume MQTT messages for visualization and operator interaction. All services run as Docker containers on a single PC."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Continuous Validation Service continuously compares measured trajectories against simulated trajectories, calculates distance metrics, and checks them against a predefined threshold; if breached, operators are alerted on the Grafana dashboard. The simulation also provides confidence bounds (upper and lower) for trajectory traces."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between PT and DT components relies on MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto) for signaling and data exchange, and on standard TCP/IP connections for TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL) queries and Grafana dashboard access."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All digital twin services are hosted on a personal computer; the Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard are Docker‑containerized and started via a Docker‑Compose file. The Python modules and applications are installed locally (pip) and run as separate processes."
]
